scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.db:seed: set PGPASSWORD=12345&& set PGCLIENTENCODING=UTF8&& psql -U postgres -d transport_db -f scripts/seed.sql
scripts.db:init: set PGPASSWORD=12345&& set PGCLIENTENCODING=UTF8&& psql -U postgres -d transport_db -f scripts/init-db.sql
scripts.db:reset: set PGPASSWORD=12345&& set PGCLIENTENCODING=UTF8&& psql -U postgres -d transport_db -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;" && psql -U postgres -d transport_db -f scripts/init-db.sql
scripts.db:drop: set PGPASSWORD=12345&& set PGCLIENTENCODING=UTF8&& psql -U postgres -d transport_db -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;"
